overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Japanese horror game featuring a schoolgirl character exploring dark traditional wooden interiors. The character navigates candlelit corridors with hanging chains, enters a blue-lit room with bloodstained tatami mats, and ascends wooden stairs in a tense, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden room transitioning to narrow corridor

events.description: character walks through doorway from initial room into candlelit corridor

agents.ego_description: walking from a small wooden room through a doorway into a narrow corridor illuminated by warm candlelight

entered.detail: dark wooden panel walls with vertical beams
wooden door frame leading to corridor
tall stand with lit candle providing warm yellow light
metal chains hanging from ceiling in the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit wooden room with traditional Japanese architecture. The character walks through a doorway around the 3-second mark, entering a narrow corridor illuminated by candle stands. Hanging chains dangle from the ceiling ahead, creating an ominous atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor with hanging chains and bloodstains

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark corridor, passing candle stands and blood-splattered walls

entered.detail: red blood stains splattered on the white wall surface

segments.scene_description: The character continues through a narrow, dark wooden corridor illuminated by scattered candle stands. Hanging chains dangle from the ceiling overhead, and blood splatters appear on the walls. The environment maintains a claustrophobic, tense atmosphere as the character moves forward.

events.description: character enters doorway into a room with distinct cool blue lighting
lighting shifts from warm candlelight to cool blue artificial light

agents.ego_description: approaching and walking through a doorway into a room with blue lighting and tatami mat flooring

entered.detail: traditional Japanese straw mat flooring with blood stains
low wooden bookshelf with books and objects
traditional paper screen window with wooden bars

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the corridor and enters a doorway around 32 seconds. The scene transitions dramatically from warm candlelight to cool blue lighting as the character steps into a room with tatami mat flooring. A wooden shelf and shoji screen become visible in the new space.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional room with tatami mats and bloodstains

events.description: character draws and holds a knife while exploring the room

agents.ego_description: exploring the blue-lit room, drawing a knife and examining the bloodstained tatami mats and wooden furniture

entered.detail: large dark blood stains on the tatami mats
lit lantern on a wooden stand

segments.scene_description: The character explores a traditional Japanese room illuminated by eerie blue light. The tatami mats are stained with blood, and wooden furniture including a shelf and cabinet are visible. Around 40 seconds, the character draws a knife while cautiously moving through the space, examining the disturbing scene.

events.description: character exits the blue-lit room through a doorway

agents.ego_description: exiting the blue room and ascending a wooden staircase into an upper corridor with candle lighting

segments.scene_description: The character exits the blue-lit room around 48 seconds and immediately begins ascending a wooden staircase. The lighting returns to warm candlelight as the character climbs into an upper corridor, leaving the bloodstained room behind. The segment ends with the character continuing through the dimly lit upper hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic wooden interior that shifts from warm, candlelit corridors to a chilling blue-lit chamber before ascending to an upper level. It begins in a dimly lit room, moving through a doorway into a narrow hallway where candle stands cast flickering light on hanging chains and blood-splattered walls. As the character reaches the end of the corridor, the scene transitions dramatically from warm tones to an eerie blue glow upon entering a room with bloodstained tatami mats and traditional shoji screens. The camera then follows the character as they cautiously draw a knife to examine the disturbing space before exiting the room. Finally, the lighting returns to a warm, dim hue as the character ascends a wooden staircase and moves forward into an upper hallway.
